item.title: 17th-century still life meets 21st-century financial data. 🤝 Yes, really! @andre...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (6 medier)

@andreiongd

17th-century still life meets 21st-century financial data. 🤝 Yes, really!

@andreiongd built a whole logic system to compose these scenes, then nudged every object by hand until it felt less “generated” and more “hung in a museum.” The work contains multitudes.

ICYMI: Mercury Insights is live. Your business data never looked this good.

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (6 medier)

@andreiongd

17th-century still life meets 21st-century financial data. 🤝 Yes, really!

@andreiongd built a whole logic system to compose these scenes, then nudged every object by hand until it felt less “generated” and more “hung in a museum.” The work contains multitudes.

ICYMI: Mercury Insights is live. Your business data never looked this good.

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: andreiongd

item.title: Playing around with gradients and grids with a 3d composition. The gradients are...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (6 medier)

@andreiongd

Playing around with gradients and grids with a 3d composition. The gradients are light and subtle with sharp and rigid shapes.

#computationaldesign
#creativecoding
#motiondesign

item.title: "SHOWREEL" *SOUND ON* Showreel showcasing select work I have done whilst freelan...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@andreiongd

"SHOWREEL"

*SOUND ON* Showreel showcasing select work I have done whilst freelancing. Works include motion, computational design systems, motion identity, interactive web animations and custom design tools.

I am currently available for commissions and would love to do more projects like these soon :)

Swipe to see intro experiments!

Sound: @pandrs_ 🧙 🧙!!

#p5js
#processing
#creativecoding
#motiondesign
#buckuback
#kinetictypography

Se slideshow på Instagram

*SOUND ON* Showreel showcasing select work I have done whilst freelancing. Works include motion, computational design systems, motion identity, interactive web animations and custom design tools.

item.author: andreiongd

item.title: "BIELKE&YANG" In collaboration with Oslo based studio @bielkeyang to explore the...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (6 medier)

@andreiongd

"BIELKE&YANG"

In collaboration with Oslo based studio @bielkeyang to explore their ampersand logo. The idea was to take the logo and reimagine it as digital and experimental, while still retaining the original identity. The studio is in the process of redesigning their website and wanted different outputs that could be used digitally for web and physically for their new office. Inspired by their new light installation, I created a custom tool with a flexible design system that allows the studio to customise the output, allowing for endless variations.

#processing
#p5js
#computerart
#programming
#new_media_art
#digitalart
#computationaldesign
#flexibledesign
#aftereffects
#contemporarytype
#generativegraphics
#motiondesign
#creativecodeart
#genartclub
#creativecoding
#kinetictype
#kinetictypography
#type01
#eyeondesign
#youaretypography

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (6 medier)

@andreiongd

"BIELKE&YANG"

In collaboration with Oslo based studio @bielkeyang to explore their ampersand logo. The idea was to take the logo and reimagine it as digital and experimental, while still retaining the original identity. The studio is in the process of redesigning their website and wanted different outputs that could be used digitally for web and physically for their new office. Inspired by their new light installation, I created a custom tool with a flexible design system that allows the studio to customise the output, allowing for endless variations.

item.title: *SOUND ON* Discover Science Journals, part of @springernature wanted to create a...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (4 medier)

@andreiongd

*SOUND ON* Discover Science Journals, part of @springernature wanted to create a visual diary that will tell the story of their brand and convey what they represent. The concept revolves around the particles, represented as letters, freely moving and shifting shapes, seamlessly transitioning between the different topics they represent.

#generativedesign
#computationaldesign
#aftereffects
#processing
#p5js
#contemporarytype
#type01
#visualfodder
#eyeondesign
#kinetictypography
#kinetictype
#motiondesign
#genartclub

#creativecoding

Se slideshow på Instagram

The concept revolves around the particles, represented as letters, freely moving and shifting shapes, seamlessly transitioning between the different topics they represent.
